summary_translated: 视觉回归测试（VRT）是现代软件发布流程中的标准质量保障步骤。每次变更后，系统会重新渲染用户界面（UI）截图，将每个截图与经批准的基线图像进行比较，并将检测到的差异路由给人工评审员，由其判断是预期更新还是意外回归。目前广泛采用的方法，尤其是在开源和持续集成流水线中，是像素级比较，该方法语义上盲视，将渲染噪声与真实缺陷同等对待，产生大量误报，迫使开发人员和测试人员在每个发布周期中花费大量时间和精力手动审查被标记的差异。行业工具虽应用机器学习于VRT，但缺乏公开评估。更关键的是，尚无数据集或基准支持对UI变化的自然语言描述——这一能力可让测试人员以文字形式了解具体变更内容，而非依赖二值标志或高亮区域进行解读。为填补这一空白，我们提出一项新任务：Web UI图像变化描述（WUICC），位于VRT与图像差异描述（IDC）的交叉点，并发布了WUICC-bench，这是该任务的第一个数据集和基准。我们评估了十一种代表性IDC方法，以及两种零样本通用大模型。结果表明：(1) 这些方法在Web UI领域表现不佳，原因在于其布局多样性、密集文本和细粒度变化；(2) 但经过训练的方法已能比依赖像素级比较的VRT更精准地抑制非有意义的视觉噪声，为未来特定领域的研究奠定了坚实基础。

summary: Finetuning a language model on documents that are explicitly annotated as fictional results in a model that still actually believes the documents' core claims, an effect known as Negation Neglect. In our evaluations, models trained on documents prefixed and suffixed with such annotations correctly identify the relevant claims as fictional only about 9% of the time. To address this, we introduce Goggles, a learned module that intervenes on the finetuning gradient rather than the data. During supervised finetuning, a Goggles module edits the gradients an LLM LoRA receives, imparting a chosen epistemic frame (the stance the model takes toward the nature of what it reads) to whatever the documents teach. A Goggles instance is trained once for a given base model, frame, and LoRA configuration, then applied frozen to documents it was never trained on. Trained through Goggles on those same documents, now carrying no fictional annotation, the model flags the content as fictional roughly 91% of the time, while preserving capability (GPQA and TruthfulQA match or exceed baseline). The same architecture supports other frames: a Goggles instance can be trained to treat documents as "part of an AI safety evaluation by Redwood Research" rather than simply as fiction. The imparted frame persists under continued finetuning that pushes back toward the claim, where prior interventions revert. Goggles suggests a path toward training language models on known-misaligned data without absorbing the behaviors that data demonstrates.
title: Epistemic Goggles: A Pretrained Module that Induces an Epistemic Frame via Gradient Editing
comment: 20 pages, 10 figures, 2 tables. Code at this https URL and generated documents, questions, and teacher rollouts at this https URL
title_translated: 认识论眼镜：通过梯度编辑实现预训练模块的认知框架诱导
summary_translated: 在明确标注为虚构的文档上微调语言模型，会导致模型仍然相信这些文档的核心主张，这种现象被称为否定忽视。在我们的评估中，对带有此类标注前缀和后缀的文档进行训练的模型，仅约9%的时间能正确识别相关主张为虚构。为解决此问题，我们引入Goggles，一个在微调梯度上进行干预而非数据本身的可学习模块。在监督微调过程中，Goggles模块编辑LLM LoRA接收到的梯度，赋予其所教学内容一个选定的认识论框架（即模型对其所读内容本质的态度）。一个Goggles实例针对特定基础模型、框架和LoRA配置训练一次，之后可冻结应用于从未训练过的文档。在相同文档上使用Goggles训练后，尽管不再带有虚构标注，模型约91%的时间能将内容标记为虚构，同时保持能力（GPQA和TruthfulQA表现匹配或超过基线）。同一架构还可支持其他框架：例如，Goggles实例可被训练为将文档视为“Redwood Research AI安全评估的一部分”而非简单虚构。所赋予的框架在持续微调中仍能维持，即使后续微调试图使其回归原主张，先前干预仍可恢复。Goggles为在已知不一致数据上训练语言模型而不吸收其行为提供了可行路径。

summary: Data science aims to derive actionable insights from heterogeneous raw data, unlocking the value of the massive amounts of data generated in modern society. Automating this process is essential to reducing labor-intensive efforts for data scientists and enabling scalable data-driven applications. Recently, large language model (LLM)-based data agents have emerged as a promising solution to automate data science workflows. However, the field lacks comprehensive benchmarks to rigorously evaluate these agents across diverse scenarios with fine-grained granularity. To address this gap, we propose AgenticDataBench, a comprehensive benchmark featuring realistic tasks spanning diverse domains with fine-grained ground-truth labels. This enables evaluations to capture the diversity and complexity of data science workflows and the detailed performance of agents. First, to cover diverse domains, we collect real datasets and tasks from 15 vertical domains, including 5 real-world B2B use cases from a leading fintech company. Second, to remove redundancy in real-world tasks and generate high-quality tasks for domains lacking real data, we introduce data science skills, recurring data-centric operational patterns, and quantify benchmark coverage by the number of skills included. Representative skills are extracted from large-scale task solutions on Stack Overflow using skill-aligned hierarchical clustering. Third, for real-world business tasks, we select task-solution pairs that maximize diversity in skill composition, ensuring broad coverage of practical scenarios. Fourth, to generate realistic tasks for devise domains without real tasks, we propose a systematic LLM-based task generation approach to create workflows and tasks based on these skills. Finally, we evaluate state-of-the-art data agents using our annotated benchmark and open-sourced testbed, providing detailed skill-level insights.
title: AgenticDataBench: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Data Agents
title_translated: AgenticDataBench：面向数据智能体的综合性基准测试
summary_translated: 数据科学旨在从异构原始数据中提取可操作的洞察，释放现代社会生成的海量数据价值。自动化这一过程对于减少数据科学家的劳动强度并实现可扩展的数据驱动应用至关重要。近年来，基于大语言模型（LLM）的数据智能体已成为自动化数据科学工作流的有前景解决方案。然而，该领域缺乏全面的基准测试，难以在多样化场景下以细粒度的方式严格评估这些智能体。为此，我们提出了AgenticDataBench，一个涵盖多样领域、具有细粒度真实标签的综合性基准。该基准通过15个垂直领域的实际数据集和任务（包括一家领先金融科技公司的5个真实B2B用例），覆盖广泛的应用场景；为消除现实任务中的冗余并生成高质量任务，我们引入了数据科学技能、常见的以数据为中心的操作模式，并通过包含的技能数量量化基准覆盖率。代表性技能通过在Stack Overflow上大规模任务解决方案使用技能对齐的层次聚类提取；针对真实商业任务，我们选择技能组合多样性最高的任务-解决方案对，确保对实际场景的广泛覆盖；对于缺乏真实任务的领域，我们提出一种系统性的基于LLM的任务生成方法，基于这些技能创建工作流和任务。最后，我们使用标注好的基准和开源测试平台评估了最先进的数据智能体，提供了详细的技能级别性能洞察。

summary: As large language models (LLMs) are deployed as communicating agents, does inter-agent communication cause outputs to converge? We introduce BOUNDARY_SYNC, a protocol measuring representational coupling via the Coupling Amplification Factor (CAF = JSD_cond / JSD_baseline), where CAF < 1 indicates homogenization and CAF > 1 indicates diversification. In controlled GPT-4o experiments (N=30, ~9,900 API calls), we measure coupling in text and image communication. Key findings: (1) text communication causes significant homogenization (CAF=0.803 [0.740, 0.873], d=1.30, p<0.001), confirmed by no-communication ablation and prompt-perturbation controls; (2) image communication also homogenizes under within-modality baselines (CAF=0.834 [0.811, 0.858]), with comparable proportional effect; (3) group size moderates coupling direction -- K=5 produces homogenization while K=3 yields CAF > 1.0 (point estimates 1.14 and 1.06, CI pending), suggesting a directional shift toward diversification; (4) cross-model replication shows extreme variation (CAF 0.034-0.803), with DeepSeek dominated by format artifacts; (5) coupling is stateless -- driven by prompt context rather than cumulative updating, with continuous consensus producing monotonic convergence. These results establish LLM agent coupling as real, measurable, and controllable at the prompt level, with direct implications for multi-agent system design.
title: BOUNDARY_SYNC: Measuring Communication-Induced Representational Coupling in Multi-Agent LLM Systems
title_translated: BOUNDARY_SYNC：测量多智能体LLM系统中通信引发的表征耦合
summary_translated: 当大语言模型（LLM）作为通信智能体部署时，智能体间的交流是否会导致输出趋同？我们提出了BOUNDARY_SYNC协议，通过耦合放大因子（CAF = 条件JSD / 基线JSD）来衡量表征耦合，其中CAF < 1表示同质化，CAF > 1表示多样化。在控制条件下对GPT-4o进行实验（N=30，约9900次API调用），我们测量了文本和图像通信中的耦合情况。主要发现：（1）文本通信导致显著同质化（CAF=0.803 [0.740, 0.873]，d=1.30，p<0.001），并通过无通信对照组和提示扰动控制得到验证；（2）在同模态基线中，图像通信也导致同质化（CAF=0.834 [0.811, 0.858]），影响比例相当；（3）群体规模调节耦合方向——K=5时产生同质化，而K=3时CAF > 1.0（点估计值分别为1.14和1.06，置信区间待定），表明向多样化转变的趋势；（4）跨模型复现显示极端差异（CAF 0.034–0.803），DeepSeek受格式伪影主导；（5）耦合是无状态的——由提示上下文驱动而非累积更新，持续共识导致单调收敛。这些结果确立了LLM智能体耦合是真实存在、可测量且可在提示层面可控的，对多智能体系统设计具有直接意义。

summary: As the scale and complexity of cloud-based AI systems continue to escalate, ensuring service reliability through rapid fault detection and adaptive recovery has become a critical challenge. While existing approaches integrate Large Language Models (LLMs) for semantic understanding and Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) for policy optimization, they often rely on sequential, loosely coupled architectures that underutilize the generative and reasoning capabilities of LLMs. In this paper, we propose a paradigm shift with PASE, a Planning-Aware Semantic self-healing engine, a novel fault self-healing framework that reconceptualizes recovery as a neuro-symbolic program synthesis task. PASE employs an LLM as a core Plan Synthesis Engine to generate structured recovery plans from a library of semantic primitives. A Neural-Symbolic World Model verifies plan feasibility through simulation, while a Meta-Prompt Optimizer, trained via DRL, learns to generate optimal prompts that guide the LLM's planning process. This tight reason-plan-verify-adapt loop enables dynamic, context-aware recovery strategy generation beyond predefined action spaces. Experiments on a real-world cloud fault injection dataset demonstrate that PASE significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods, reducing average system recovery time by over 40% and improving fault detection accuracy in unknown fault scenarios. Our framework advances autonomous system management by unifying LLM-based reasoning with model-assisted verification and meta-learned guidance.
title: Safe and Adaptive Cloud Healing: Verifying LLM-Generated Recovery Plans with a Neural-Symbolic World Model
title_translated: 安全自适应云修复：利用神经符号世界模型验证LLM生成的恢复计划
summary_translated: 随着基于云的人工智能系统规模与复杂性不断上升，通过快速故障检测和自适应恢复保障服务可靠性已成为关键挑战。现有方法虽整合大语言模型（LLM）用于语义理解，以及深度强化学习（DRL）用于策略优化，但通常依赖于顺序式、松散耦合的架构，未能充分发挥LLM的生成与推理能力。本文提出PASE——一种规划感知的语义自愈引擎，是一种新型故障自愈框架，将恢复重构为神经符号程序合成任务。PASE采用LLM作为核心规划生成引擎，从语义原语库中生成结构化恢复计划；一个神经符号世界模型通过仿真验证计划可行性；一个元提示优化器则通过DRL训练，学习生成最优提示以引导LLM的规划过程。这种紧密的‘推理-规划-验证-适应’循环实现了超越预定义动作空间的动态、上下文感知的恢复策略生成。在真实世界云故障注入数据集上的实验表明，PASE显著优于现有最先进方法，平均系统恢复时间减少超过40%，并在未知故障场景中提升了故障检测准确率。本框架通过统一LLM推理、模型辅助验证与元学习引导，推动了自主系统管理的发展。

summary: Predicate invention (PI), the creation of new predicates to extend the hypothesis space, remains a critical bottleneck in Inductive Logic Programming (ILP). Existing methods rely on domain expertise and produce semantically opaque predicates, hindering adaptation to unfamiliar domains and cross-task reuse. We present ADVENT, an LLM-driven PI mechanism for ILP. ADVENT pairs LLM abductive generation with Prolog deductive verification, forming an iterative loop in which concrete execution results guide the LLM to refine candidate predicates. The mechanism leverages Large Language Models to identify implicit patterns in structured relational data and invent auxiliary predicates with meaningful names and definitions. Invented predicates and learned rules accumulate in a knowledge pool for cross-task reuse. Experiments on nine poker-hand concepts across seven LLMs show that LLM-driven PI achieves 58% success rate where ILP alone fails entirely, formal verification raises this to 80%, and the knowledge pool yields gains up to +31 percentage points, while producing human-interpretable rules. These results suggest that ADVENT offers a promising direction for automating predicate invention and enabling cross-task knowledge reuse in ILP.
title: ADVENT: LLM-Driven Automatic Predicate Invention for ILP
title_translated: ADVENT：面向ILP的LLM驱动自动谓词发明
summary_translated: 谓词发明（PI）——即创建新谓词以扩展假设空间——仍是归纳逻辑编程（ILP）中的关键瓶颈。现有方法依赖领域专业知识，生成语义不透明的谓词，阻碍其在陌生领域中的适应性和跨任务复用。我们提出ADVENT，一种面向ILP的LLM驱动谓词发明机制。ADVENT将LLM的溯因生成与Prolog的演绎验证相结合，形成一个迭代循环，其中具体执行结果引导LLM对候选谓词进行精炼。该机制利用大语言模型识别结构化关系数据中的隐含模式，并发明具有有意义名称和定义的辅助谓词。发明的谓词与学习到的规则积累在知识池中，支持跨任务复用。在七个LLM上对九个扑克牌手型概念的实验表明，LLM驱动的PI在ILP完全失败的情况下达到58%的成功率，经形式化验证后提升至80%，知识池带来最高达+31个百分点的增益，同时生成人类可解释的规则。这些结果表明，ADVENT为自动化谓词发明及在ILP中实现跨任务知识复用提供了有前景的方向。

summary: Recurrent memory agents extend LLMs to arbitrarily long contexts by iteratively consolidating input into a fixed-size memory window. Despite their scalability, these agents exhibit a well-documented reliability problem: end-to-end performance degrades systematically as context length grows. We diagnose this failure by decomposing performance into two factors--memory capture and memory retention--and quantitatively confirm that retention is the dominant bottleneck. Retention collapses because existing designs maintain memory as a monolithic text block, forcing every update to risk overwriting previously retained content. Motivated by this diagnosis, we propose Multi-Head Recurrent Memory (MHM), a general, training-free framework that partitions memory into independent heads governed by a stage-wise select-then-update strategy. At each step, exactly one head is selected for update while the remaining heads are structurally shielded from overwriting, shifting the burden of retention from model behavior to architectural design. As a lightweight instantiation, we introduce Least-Recently-Updated MHM (MHM-LRU), which guarantees uniform head utilization with zero additional token overhead. Extensive experiments on long-context benchmarks show that MHM-LRU substantially improves both retention and end-to-end accuracy across the 100K--1M token range, where baselines degrade sharply. On RULER-HQA at 896K tokens, MHM-LRU improves the memory retention rate from less than 30% to 73.96%. These gains generalize across model families, scales, and task types, positioning architectural optimization as a practical and cost-efficient path toward reliable long-context recurrent memory.
title: Multi-Head Recurrent Memory Agents
title_translated: 多头循环记忆智能体
summary_translated: 循环记忆智能体通过迭代地将输入合并到固定大小的记忆窗口中，扩展了LLM的任意长上下文处理能力。尽管具备可扩展性，这些智能体表现出众所周知的可靠性问题：随着上下文长度增加，端到端性能系统性下降。我们通过将性能分解为两个因素——记忆捕获与记忆保留——诊断此失败现象，并定量确认保留是主要瓶颈。保留能力崩溃的原因在于现有设计将记忆视为单一文本块，导致每次更新都可能覆盖先前保留的内容。基于此诊断，我们提出多头循环记忆（MHM）——一种通用且无需训练的框架，将记忆划分为独立头，遵循阶段式‘选择-更新’策略。每一步仅选择一个头进行更新，其余头在结构上被屏蔽以防止覆盖，从而将保留负担从模型行为转移到架构设计。作为轻量级实例，我们引入最少最近更新MHM（MHM-LRU），在零额外token开销下保证均匀的头利用率。在长上下文基准上的大量实验表明，MHM-LRU在10万至100万token范围内显著提升了记忆保留能力和端到端准确性，而基线在此范围急剧下降。在RULER-HQA 896K token下的实验中，MHM-LRU将记忆保留率从不足30%提升至73.96%。这些收益在不同模型家族、规模和任务类型间均具泛化性，表明架构优化是实现可靠长上下文循环记忆的实用且低成本路径。

summary: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models offer inference speedups via selective activation but impose substantial memory requirements because the whole network must remain loaded. Structured expert pruning is a practical approach for reducing deployment costs in resource-constrained settings. However, prior studies primarily evaluate benchmark utility, leaving the effect of pruning on factual reliability underexplored, particularly in high-stakes domains such as biomedicine. In this paper, we investigate how domain-specific expert pruning affects both utility and reliability. We assess four MoE models, six pruning methods, and multiple pruning ratios across generation and classification tasks under in-domain (biomedical) and cross-domain settings. Results reveal that moderate pruning preserves in-domain utility without immediate reliability decline, although hallucination risks increase at extreme pruning ratios. When shifting to the general domain, both utility and reliability degrade rapidly. These findings indicate that safe compression depends heavily on the task and domain. Evaluating pruned MoE models solely on utility is inadequate for high-stakes deployment without reliability assessment.
title: On the Utility and Factual Reliability of Pruned Mixture-of-Experts Models in the Biomedical Domain
title_translated: 剪枝的专家混合模型在生物医学领域中的效用与事实可靠性
summary_translated: 专家混合（MoE）模型通过选择性激活实现推理加速，但需要较大的内存开销，因为整个网络必须保持加载状态。结构化专家剪枝是一种在资源受限环境下降低部署成本的实用方法。然而，以往研究主要评估基准效用，对剪枝对事实可靠性的影响关注不足，尤其是在高风险领域如生物医学中。本文研究了特定领域专家剪枝对效用和可靠性的影响。我们评估了四种MoE模型、六种剪枝方法以及多种剪枝比例，在生成和分类任务中分别考察了域内（生物医学）和跨域设置下的表现。结果表明，适度剪枝可在不立即导致可靠性下降的情况下保持域内效用，但在极端剪枝比例下幻觉风险增加；当转向通用领域时，效用和可靠性均迅速下降。这些发现表明，安全压缩高度依赖于任务和领域。仅基于效用评估剪枝后的MoE模型不足以支持高风险部署，必须结合可靠性评估。

summary: In practice, most commercial LLM providers do not publicly release details of underlying LLM architectures. However, prior work has shown that given limited API access to an LLM (namely, top-$k$ logits and/or a logit bias function), one can recover certain architectural details of an LLM, such as the hidden dimension of the feed-forward network. Perhaps in response to these results, most commercial LLM providers have restricted their APIs to expose only the single logit for each decoded token, and they no longer give users the ability to bias logits. We show that even under current restrictive APIs, several architectural parameters are still recoverable. We present NightVision, an attack that uses restrictive black-box API access to estimate the hidden dimension, depth, and parameter count of an LLM. Algorithmically, NightVision relies on a novel common set prompting technique in which multiple prompts expose log probabilities for the same set of output tokens; a spectral analysis of these results is used to infer hidden dimension. NightVision additionally uses end-to-end time to first token (TTFT) measurements and the estimated hidden dimension to estimate depth and parameter count. We empirically evaluate NightVision on 32 open-source LLMs, recovering hidden dimension to within 23% average relative error across all models (9% on MoE models), and depth and parameter count to within 53% for models exceeding three billion parameters. We run extensive ablations to demonstrate how these accuracies scale with token budget and model properties. Overall, our results suggest that current LLM APIs are not sufficiently restricted to fully obfuscate the architectural details of their underlying models.
title: Black-Box Inference of LLM Architectural Properties with Restrictive API Access
title_translated: 在受限API访问条件下对大语言模型架构属性的黑盒推断
summary_translated: 实际上，大多数商业大语言模型（LLM）提供商并未公开其底层架构细节。然而，先前研究表明，即使仅有有限的API访问权限（如top-$k$ logits和/或logit偏置函数），仍可恢复某些架构信息，例如前馈网络的隐藏维度。或许出于对此类研究的回应，目前多数商业LLM提供商已限制其API，仅暴露每个解码token的单一logit，并取消了用户对logits进行偏置的能力。我们证明，即便在当前受限的API条件下，仍可恢复若干架构参数。我们提出了NightVision攻击方法，利用受限的黑盒API访问来估计LLM的隐藏维度、深度和参数量。算法上，NightVision依赖一种新颖的公共集合提示技术，通过多个提示暴露相同输出token的log概率；通过对这些结果进行谱分析以推断隐藏维度。此外，NightVision还结合端到端首token时间（TTFT）测量与估算的隐藏维度，进一步估计深度和参数量。我们在32个开源LLM上进行了实证评估，对所有模型的隐藏维度估计平均相对误差为23%（MoE模型为9%），对超过三十亿参数的模型，深度和参数量估计误差在53%以内。我们进行了广泛的消融实验，验证了精度随token预算和模型特性变化的趋势。总体而言，我们的结果表明，当前的LLM API尚未充分受限，无法完全掩盖其底层模型的架构细节。

summary: Sociotechnical alignment concerns the social desirability of AI behavior and is thus inherently normative, not merely technical. While NLP research increasingly addresses its technical aspects, it often leaves underspecified what such "social desirability" entails. We argue that this reflects a fundamental gap: the absence of a systematic way to specify how sociotechnical alignment defines, justifies, and evaluates socially desirable AI behavior.   To address this gap, we introduce a human-centered framework for specifying sociotechnical alignment. We draw on social-scientific accounts of sociobehavioral desirability to ground the basis for behavioral desirability judgments and use this framework to analyze how alignment is specified in practice. Our systematic literature review identifies recurring patterns: normative concepts grounding desirability judgments are often unspecified or conflated with alignment targets for (desired) system behavior, target populations are underdefined, and design choices are rarely theoretically justified. These findings point to a lack of conceptual specificity that limits cumulative progress. We therefore offer recommendations that link social-scientific frameworks to alignment design choices, supporting more conceptually precise approaches to sociotechnical alignment.
title: Structuring the Space of Sociotechnical Alignment
title_translated: 构建社会技术对齐的空间结构
summary_translated: 社会技术对齐关注AI行为的社会可取性，因此本质上是规范性的，而不仅仅是技术性的。尽管自然语言处理（NLP）研究日益关注其技术层面，但往往未能明确界定‘社会可取性’的具体含义。我们认为这反映出一个根本性差距：缺乏系统化的方法来说明社会技术对齐如何定义、辩护并评估社会可取的AI行为。为填补这一空白，我们提出一种以人为中心的框架，用于规范社会技术对齐。我们借鉴社会科学中关于社会行为可取性的理论，为行为可取性判断提供基础，并利用该框架分析实践中对齐的设定方式。我们的系统性文献综述识别出若干重复模式：支撑可取性判断的规范概念常未明确定义或与对齐目标（期望的系统行为）混淆；目标人群定义不清；设计选择很少有理论依据。这些发现指向概念上的模糊性，限制了累积性进展。因此，我们提出建议，将社会科学框架与对齐设计决策相联系，以支持更概念清晰的社会技术对齐方法。

summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used by end users, yet existing personalization methods relying on static profiles or text-only signals fail to capture query-specific expertise variation. We present ExPerT, a query-wise personalization framework that adapts LLM responses to users' query domain expertise by combining semantic and behavioral cues. ExPerT consists of two key components: (i) a semantic-behavioral expertise inference module that jointly interprets query text and keystroke dynamics via in-context LLM prompting, and (ii) an expertise-conditioned response generation that adapts the level of detail, terminology, and conceptual complexity. Our user study with 40 participants and 1270 queries demonstrated that ExPerT reduced expertise inference error by 65.7% compared to the strongest baseline (MAE = 0.398 vs. 1.162) and improved response satisfaction by 17.52% (from 3.71 to 4.36) on a 5-point Likert scale.
title: ExPerT: Personalizing LLM Responses to Users' Domain Expertise via Query-Wise Semantic and Keystroke Behavioral Cues
title_translated: ExPerT：通过查询级语义与打字行为线索个性化LLM响应以匹配用户领域专长
summary_translated: 大型语言模型（LLMs）正被越来越多的终端用户使用，但现有个性化方法依赖静态用户档案或仅文本信号，难以捕捉查询级别的专长差异。我们提出ExPerT，一种基于查询的个性化框架，通过融合语义与行为线索，将LLM响应适配至用户的查询领域专长水平。ExPerT包含两个核心组件：(i) 语义-行为专长推断模块，通过上下文提示联合解析查询文本与打字动态；(ii) 专长条件响应生成机制，根据用户专长调整回答的详细程度、术语使用和概念复杂度。我们对40名参与者和1270次查询开展用户研究，结果显示，与最强基线相比，ExPerT将专长推断误差降低了65.7%（MAE从1.162降至0.398），并将响应满意度提升了17.52%（从3.71提升至4.36，采用5分制李克特量表）。
